power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: A heavy blow that deals increased damage.

quick_slash.name: Quick Slash
quick_slash.description: A swift strike with a chance to attack twice.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: Damages all enemies in front of you.

bash.name: Bash
bash.description: A stunning blow that may stagger the enemy.

execute.name: Execute
execute.description: Deals massive damage to weakened foes.

bleed_blade.name: Bleed Blade
bleed_blade.description: Leaves a bleeding wound on the target.

iron_swing.name: Iron Swing
iron_swing.description: A heavy overhead swing with crushing force.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Spins and strikes all surrounding enemies.

rally_strike.name: Rally Strike
rally_strike.description: A rallying blow that inspires allies — bonus damage if party is nearby.

crushing_blow.name: Crushing Blow
crushing_blow.description: An earth-shattering strike that ignores some defense.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Hurls a ball of fire at the enemy.

blaze_storm.name: Blaze Storm
blaze_storm.description: A devastating firestorm across all enemies.

ice_shard.name: Ice Shard
ice_shard.description: Launches a piercing shard of ice.

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.description: Freezes enemies with a burst of cold.

glacial_spike.name: Glacial Spike
glacial_spike.description: Summons a massive spike of ice. Slows enemies.

thunder_bolt.name: Thunder Bolt
thunder_bolt.description: Strikes with a bolt of lightning.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: Lightning that chains between multiple enemies.

storm_urge.name: Storm Urge
storm_urge.description: Unleashes a catastrophic storm upon all enemies.

shadow_strike.name: Shadow Strike
shadow_strike.description: Attacks from the shadows, bypassing some defense.

soul_drain.name: Soul Drain
soul_drain.description: Drains enemy life force and heals the caster.

void_blast.name: Void Blast
void_blast.description: Channels the void to devastate enemies.

arcane_surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane_surge.description: Channels raw arcane energy into a surge of power.

void_collapse.name: Void Collapse
void_collapse.description: Collapses void energy into a singular devastating blast.

null_zone.name: Null Zone
null_zone.description: Creates a zone of anti-magic that drains enemies.

gale_force.name: Gale Force
gale_force.description: A violent gust that strikes all enemies.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Shatters the ground beneath your enemies.

stone_shatter.name: Stone Shatter
stone_shatter.description: Calls upon ancient stone to crush foes.

healing_touch.name: Healing Touch
healing_touch.description: Restores 100 HP to a single ally.

healing_light.name: Healing Light
healing_light.description: Restores 280 HP to a single ally.

greater_heal.name: Greater Heal
greater_heal.description: Restores 600 HP to a single ally.

full_restore.name: Full Restore
full_restore.description: Fully restores HP and clears all status effects on an ally.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: Grants +20 agility to an ally for 3 turns.

iron_guard.name: Iron Guard
iron_guard.description: Grants +30 defense to an ally for 3 turns.

empower.name: Empower
empower.description: Grants +25% attack power to an ally for 3 turns.

arcane_infuse.name: Arcane Infuse
arcane_infuse.description: Grants +30% magic damage to an ally for 3 turns.

cleanse.name: Cleanse
cleanse.description: Removes all negative status effects from an ally.

barrier.name: Barrier
barrier.description: Creates a shield absorbing damage for 3 turns.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.description: Revives a downed ally at 30% HP. One use per combat.

rally.name: Rally
rally.description: Grants +10% all stats to ALL allies for 2 turns.
